meta.title: Biochemical Studies on the Cytopathic Effect of Influenza Viruses

abstractHtml: An influenza virus was inactivated stepwise by ethylene iminoquinone Bayer A 139; a viral product with a target size similar to that of neuraminidase was responsible for the cytopathic effect on cells grown in culture.
affiliationsHtml: • Institut für Virologie, Justus Liebig-Universität, Giessen, Germany
